pattern: Once you may freely lower and reorder values, the best you can do is sort ascending and clamp each position so it grows by at most one above its predecessor, capping the final element.
hints: Reordering and lowering are both free, so the only thing that limits the peak is how many distinct steps of plus-one you can stack from a starting value of one.
Sort the values and walk left to right, never letting an element exceed the previous element plus one.
Set the first element to 1; for each later index set arr[i] = min(arr[i], arr[i-1] + 1). The answer is the last element.

edge_inputs.description: single element always collapses to one
huge gaps do not help, growth is capped by count
all ones force a flat line
needs sorting first to reveal the ramp
two elements with a big jump

stress.description: large random array of positive integers
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, min(size, 100000))
    arr = [rng.randint(1, 1000000000) for _ in range(n)]
    return [arr]
